Account.title: My Account
Account.signInMessage: Please sign in or create an account to access your profile, track orders, and manage your preferences.

Languages.title: Languages
Languages.description: Select your preferred language for the application.

Profile.title: Profile Settings
Profile.description: Manage your personal information and preferences.
Profile.photoDesc: Click to upload a new profile picture. Max 2MB.
Profile.name: Full Name

Addresses.title: My Addresses
Addresses.description: Manage your shipping and billing addresses for faster checkout.
Addresses.formDesc: Please fill in the details below.
Addresses.noAddressesDesc: You haven't added any shipping or billing addresses yet.
Addresses.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this address?

Orders.title: Order History
Orders.noOrdersDesc: When you place orders, they will appear here. Start exploring our latest collections to find something you'll love.
Orders.needHelpDesc: If you have any issues with your order, you can initiate a return or contact our support team.

HelpCenter.title: Help Center
HelpCenter.howCanWeHelpDesc: Select a topic below to chat with our support assistant.
HelpCenter.helpWithAnOrderDesc: Track, return, or report an issue with a recent purchase.
HelpCenter.generalQueryDesc: Ask about products, payments, or our policies.
HelpCenter.unableToConnect: Unable to connect to support. Please try again.
HelpCenter.sorryError: Sorry, I encountered an error processing that.

Reviews.title: My Reviews
Reviews.noReviewsDesc: You haven't shared your thoughts on any pieces yet. Your feedback helps refine our collection.

Notifications.title: Notification Preferences
Notifications.description: Choose how you would like to receive updates about your orders, exclusive collections, and promotional events. We value your privacy and inbox space.
Notifications.orderUpdatesDesc: Receive notifications when your order is processed, shipped, and delivered.
Notifications.smsAlertsDesc: Get real-time text messages on the day of delivery.
Notifications.newArrivalsDesc: Be the first to know when we launch new exclusive collections.
Notifications.exclusiveOffersDesc: Receive personalized offers, discounts, and early sale access.
Notifications.newsletterDesc: Curated style guides, brand news, and editorial content.
Notifications.noNotificationsDesc: You're all caught up! There are no new notifications at the moment.

Devices.title: Manage Devices
Devices.description: View and manage the devices where you are currently logged in.
Devices.descriptionMobile: View and manage active login sessions.
Devices.confirmRevokeAll: Are you sure you want to sign out of all other devices?

Auth.heroDesc: Curated pieces for the modern aesthete. Sign in to access your exclusive wardrobe and luxury experiences.
Auth.heroSignUpDesc: Create an account to unlock personalized recommendations, early access to new collections, and faster checkout.
Auth.signInDesc: Enter your details to sign in to your account.
Auth.signUpDesc: Enter your details below to get started.
